name: D3 Ch12 — Vault of the Drow Wandering Monsters, Vault Walls and Ceiling (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for Vault Walls and Ceiling terrain in the Vault of the Drow, Chapter 12 of D3. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d12 on this table. Use when traversing wall-hugging paths, climbing, or moving near ceiling formations.

results.text: Giant spiders (2–8; attacking from above; HD 4+4, hp 32, AC 4, SA poison; XPV 245 each)
Gargoyles (2–8; HD 4, hp 28, AC 5, #AT 4, Dmg 1–3/1–3/1–6/1–4; XPV 195 each)
Piercers (6–24; HD 1–4 by size, AC 3, drop from ceiling; Dmg 1–6/2–12/3–18/4–24; XPV 15–195 each)
Cloakers (1–3; HD 6, hp 42, AC 5, moray face attack and engulf, SA moan; XPV 650 each)
Cave fishers (1–4; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 3, filament trap — yanks prey 60 feet to mandibles; XPV 200 each)
Stirges (4–16; HD 1, hp 5, AC 8, blood drain 1–3 per round after attach; XPV 32 each)
Lurker above (1; HD 10, hp 70, AC 6, appears as stone ceiling, engulf and smother Dmg 1–6/round; XPV 3,000)
Trapper (1; HD 12, hp 84, AC 3, appears as flat stone floor, engulf and smother Dmg 4–24/round; XPV 3,900)
Drow scouts (2–4 fighters; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 4, crossbows readied from concealment; XPV 175 each)
Brown mold (1 patch; absorbs heat — all within 5 feet take 1d8 cold damage per round; immune to fire, spreads toward it)
Yellow mold (1 patch; disturbing releases 10' spore cloud — save vs. poison or die; killed by fire)
Purple worm (1; burrowing through wall; HD 15, hp 100+, AC 6, Dmg 2–24 + swallow whole on natural 20; XPV 7,600)
